info.name: Zoom webinar/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zoom Developers
 Email: developer@zoom.us

urlencoded.description: (Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
Webinar uuid. It can be fetched by /v1/webinar/uuid/list.

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
Webinar uuid. It can be fetched by /v1/webinar/uuid/list.
(Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user under this account. Cannot be updated after creation.
(Required) Webinar topic. Max of 300 characters.
(Required) 5 webinar, 6 recurrence webinar, 9 recurring webinar(With Fixed Time)
Webinar start time in ISO datetime format. For scheduled webinar only. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.
Webinar duration (minutes). For scheduled webinar only.
Timezone to format start_time, like "America/Los_Angeles". For scheduled Webinar only. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in timezone list JSON file.
Webinar password. Password may only contain the following characters: [a-z A-Z 0-9 @ - _

Recurrence Webinar Settings. For recurring webinar with fixed time only.

"type": Recurrence Webinar Type. 1 means Daily, 2 means Weekly, 3 means Monthly.
"repeat_interval": Recurrence Webinar Repeat Interval. Defaults to 1. For a Daily Webinar, max of 90. For a Weekly Webinar, max of 12. For a Monthly Webinar, max of 3.
"weekly_days": Recurrence Webinar Occurs on week days, multiple value separated by comma. 1 means Sunday, 2 means Monday, 3 means Tuesday, 4 means Wednesday, 5 means Thursday, 6 means Friday, 7 means Saturday.
"monthly_day": Recurrence Webinar Occurs on a month day. The value range is from 1 to 31.
"monthly_week": Recurrence Webinar Occurs on the week of a month. -1 means Last week, 1 means First week, 2 means Second week, 3 means Third week, 4 means Fourth week.
"monthly_week_day": Recurrence Webinar Occurs on the week day of a month. A single value: 1 means Sunday, 2 means Monday, 3 means Tuesday, 4 means Wednesday, 5 means Thursday, 6 means Friday, 7 means Saturday.
"end_times": Recurrence Webinar End occurrences times. Defaults to 1. Max of 50.
"end_date_time": Recurrence Webinar End Date. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.
Approval type. 0 means Automatically Approve. 1 means Manually Approve. 2 means No Registration Required.

Registration type. 1 means Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences, 2 means Attendees need to register for each occurrence to attend, 3 means Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend. For recurring meeting with fixed time only.
Webinar description.
Webinar audio options. Can be "both", "telephony", "voip".
Start video when host join Webinar.
Start video when panelist join Webinar.
Enable Practice Session.
Only signed-in users can join this Webinar.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join Webinar.
Alternative hosts.
Alternative hosts IDs.
Automatically record type. Can be "local", "cloud" or "none".
Webinar Panelists, should be JSON format: [{"name":"xxx","email":"test1@zoom.us"}, {"name":"xxx","email":"test2@zoom.us"}].
Language setting of email to panelists. This value should be "en-US", "en", "zh-CN", "zh", "en-ES", "es", "fr-FR" or "fr".

request.description: Create a webinar on Zoom, return the created webinar start and join URL.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user under this account. Cannot be updated after creation.
(Required) Webinar topic. Max of 300 characters.
(Required) 5 webinar, 6 recurrence webinar, 9 recurring webinar(With Fixed Time)

"end_times": Recurrence Webinar End occurrences times. Defaults to 1. Max of 50.
"end_date_time": Recurrence Webinar End Date. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.

Registration type. 1 means Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences, 2 means Attendees need to register for each occurrence to attend, 3 means Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend. For recurring meeting with fixed time only.
Webinar description.
Webinar audio options. Can be "both", "telephony", "voip".
Start video when host join Webinar.
Start video when panelist join Webinar.
Enable Practice Session.
Only signed-in users can join this Webinar.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join Webinar.
Alternative hosts.
Alternative hosts IDs.
Automatically record type. Can be "local", "cloud" or "none".
Webinar Panelists, should be JSON format: [{"name":"xxx","email":"test1@zoom.us"}, {"name":"xxx","email":"test2@zoom.us"}].
Language setting of email to panelists. This value should be "en-US", "en", "zh-CN", "zh", "en-ES", "es", "fr-FR" or "fr".
(Required) webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
Occurrence ID, could get this value from Webinar Get API.

request.description: Get a Webinar on Zoom via Webinar ID, return the Webinar info

urlencoded.description: (Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
(Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 300 meetings.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

Industry.
Organization.
Job Title.

Questions & Comments.
Custom Questions, should be JSON format: [{"title":"field_name1","value":"xxx"},{"title":"field_name2","value":"xxx"}].

request.description: Approve pending registrants on Zoom Webinar.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
(Required) Pending approval registrant ids.
(Required) Webinar host user ID. Can be any user who enabled webinar under this account.
(Required) Webinar ID.
0 means pending approval registrants, 1 means approved registrants.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.
